programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: La viuda de blanco

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián intenta convencer a Alicia para llegar a un acuerdo que alivie el gran conflicto en su familia, pero la tensión aumenta cuando él reacciona de una forma inexplicable.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia desconoce todas las prohibiciones de Justino cuando él delira por una crisis de su enfermedad. Iluminada siembra dudas en Sebastián, mientras los gemelos hablan entre ellos de su madre.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián discute con Alicia cuando ve a Dimas salir de la casa de Briñón. A Justino no le queda mucho tiempo de vida, si no acepta la ayuda médica, pero el doctor tiene otros intereses.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes her favorite picnic chicken; a fast tortellini salad with cherry tomatoes, arugula, and pine nuts; and Pimms cup for a crowd.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia's weekend plans include her favorite cast-iron chicken chilaquiles with homemade hot sauce, refreshing micheladas, and restaurant-inspired fried ice cream cake.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes a celebratory dinner inspired by Italy: fresh halibut puttanesca, garlicky broccolini, crispy polenta triangles, and olive-oil yogurt cake for dessert.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pissaladière is Provençal street food, a fragrant, pizza-like tart prized for its contrast of salty black olives and anchovies against a backdrop of sweet caramelized onions and thyme. We figure out how to make a great version of this French classic.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Too often, eggplant Parmesan is a soggy, oily mess. And pasta with chicken and broccoli is heavy and bland. But after many tests in the kitchen, we've come up with recipes that give these simple, honest dishes the respect they deserve.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta all' amatriciana is perhaps Rome's most famous dish. Despite the fancy name, it's nothing more than long-strand pasta sauced with tomatoes, onion, bacon, and hot pepper flakes and dusted with cheese. We show you how to master this simple dish.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Osso buco, literally "bone with a hole," is the Italian term for veal shanks. This meaty cut, akin to beef shanks or lamb shanks, becomes meltingly tender when stewed for several hours in a covered pot. We serve it with a simple and satisfying polenta.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Take French onion soup and baked goat cheese salad and make stellar versions of these bistro favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A sticky bun should be neither dense nor bready, neither saturated with butter nor so sugary that it makes your heart race. The crumb should be tender and feathery and the sticky glaze gently chewy and gooey. Here's how we made ours.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Brownies are too often dull, and blondies (as well as congo bars, their coconut-flavored cousins) can be even worse, since they are even plainer. We decided to keep things simple while focusing on developing superior flavor and texture.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Cakes baked in Bundt and tube pans are popular for a variety of reasons. These pans make cakes that are especially attractive, and the cakes themselves tend to be pretty simple to prepare. In this episode, we make angel food and a chocolate Bundt cake.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop the perfect pumpkin cheesecake recipe, but we never figured it would take 30 cheesecakes to develop a great recipe worthy of the finest holiday dinner.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we take two modern classic desserts —a chocolate volcano cake and caramelized pears—and make them approachable for the home cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our hearty frittata is just as filling as an omelet, but a whole lot easier to prepare and serve. We also uncover the formula for the ideal quiche filling and deliver a tender, buttery pastry crust filled with moist, smooth custard.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we look at a few of our favorite Tex-Mex dishes: tomato salsa, quesadillas, and beef tacos.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make two hearty soups: black bean and tortilla.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more synonymous with fall than butternut squash? In this episode, we explore two main-course squash recipes: a creamy, comforting soup perfect for serving on a busy weeknight and a rich, hearty risotto suitable for entertaining.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We investigate inexpensive steaks and find out which were worth eating and how best to prepare them. We also take a look at a classic accompaniment to steak: mashed potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When most people think of dishes like lasagna and jambalaya, they think of labor-intensive weekend meals. In this episode, however, we develop versions that could be prepared on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Two old-fashioned dishes with modern appeal: Boston baked beans and chicken and dumplings. Neither requires fancy ingredients or expensive equipment, just a little time and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What's for Sunday dinner? Around many American tables, it's meat and potatoes. Beef brisket is a good choice and a nice change from pot roast or beef stew. Although inexpensive and simple to prepare, brisket does pose some challenges to the cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There are certain dinners we rely on again and again. We are particularly fond of roasting chicken and potatoes together in one pan. While the chicken roasts, its juices drip onto the potatoes, giving them a wonderfully rich crust and creamy flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We develop a foolproof preparation for pork chops with vinegar and peppers—a modern version tangy and juicy enough to rival that prepared by an Italian grandmother. Next, we turn to pan-roasted pork tenderloin.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tuna, which is often served rare to medium-rare, can be particularly tricky to get just right with a nicely seared crust. As for halibut, we developed a technique that ensured perfect texture without a loss of flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some people are intimidated by the thought of preparing fish. Traditional dishes, like Fish Meunière, can seem even more daunting. But you don't need to be wearing a toque to prepare this French classic well.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most Italian recipes seem startlingly easy to prepare, requiring just a few simple ingredients. But some dishes need special care to reach their full potential. In this episode, we demystify two Italian classics: Fettuccine Alfredo and Beef in Barolo.

programme.desc: On his way to school, Koichi finds himself blackmailed by a man named Tamami Kobayashi, who frames him for running over a cat. A panicked Koichi starts to feel guilty for his actions when suddenly a giant lock appears on his chest!

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Toshikazu Hazamada (Show Off)
programme.desc: Josuke and Koichi get info that a student at their school, Toshikazu Hazamada may be a Stand user and decide to look into the case. Their suspicions are quickly confirmed after Hazamada’s wooden doll morphs into an exact copy of Josuke and attacks them.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Falls in Love, Part 1
programme.desc: Koichi is both surprised and excited when a girl named Yukako Yamagishi says she likes him. But Koichi’s joy quickly turns into fear after Yukako begins to express her love for him in very erratic and dangerous ways.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Falls in Love, Part 2
programme.desc: Yukako’s dangerous obsession with reshaping Koichi into a man fit for her gets worse, prompting Koichi to hatch an escape plan. He tries to call Josuke for help using a nearby pay phone but is stopped by Yukako, who anticipated his move.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let’s Go Eat Some Italian Food
programme.desc: Josuke and Okuyasu come across an Italian restaurant owned by an Italian chef named Tonio. When Okuyasu asks for the menu, Tonio explains that he decides the menu on the spot based on the customer he sees.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 1
programme.desc: Chili Pepper suddenly appears before Josuke to test his Stand powers. Josuke puts up a fight but is overwhelmed by Chili Pepper’s power. The next day, Josuke and friends learn from Jotaro that a man who can locate Chili Pepper is heading to Morioh

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends gather at the Port to try and reach Joseph Joestar before Chili Pepper. Speculating the enemy is hiding nearby, Jotaro orders Josuke and Koichi to stay behind and find Chili Pepper’s user while he and Okuyasu go protect Joseph.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: We Picked Up Something Crazy!
programme.desc: With Akira Otoishi arrested and the bow and arrow safely recovered, peace seemingly returns to Morioh. But Josuke’s life is far from peaceful as he struggles to deal with his father, whose old age is making things difficult for them to bond.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri confronts Murata about who he really is while the people of Caloria agree to receive help from the Demon Tribe.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: The quadrennial Ultimate Tournament is approaching and Yuri proposes forming a team to win back The End of the Wind despite Big Cimaron's rigging of the games.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: New expert Raj Bisram joins the road trip. This auctioneer from Kent is taking on Charles Hanson as they shop around Berkshire, Wiltshire and Somerset, before heading to their first auction showdown in Winchcombe.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's leg two for auctioneers Charles Hanson and Raj Bisram, and they're taking their Triumph through Somerset, Dorset and Hampshire before ending at an auction in Swanmore.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road Trip veteran Charles Hanson is halfway through a week of adventure with new recruit, Raj Bisram. The duelling auctioneers travel though Dorset and Somerset in their Triumph before heading for an auction in Bridgwater.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts David Harper and Anita Manning go head-to-head as they road trip through North England and into southern and central Scotland, heading to an auction in Knutsford, Cheshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper and Anita Manning travel through Yorkshire. Along the way, David learns about a 500-year-old mystery and Anita meets two inspirational Land Girls before they head towards the auction in Harrogate.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: After a successful last auction, David Harper has the lead, but Anita Manning is hot on his heels as they shop in Yorkshire and County Durham before heading into Newcastle for the auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the penultimate leg for antiques hunters Anita Manning and David Harper. Starting in Northumberland, England, and crossing the border into Scotland, they search for hidden gems before heading to auction in Kinbuck, Stirlingshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper and Anita Manning travel to the Isle of Bute, Glasgow and Renfewshire. They both take a massive risk in a bid to win the week, but who will come out on top when they head to the auction in Paisley?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A new pair of auctioneers, Philip Serrell and Natasha Raskin, take to the open road in search for treasure. On their first day, they travel through Wales and end at an auction in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques hunters Philip Serrell and Natasha Raskin take in the delights of South West Wales before crossing into England and heading to an auction in Newent, Gloucester.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Natasha Raskin shop in Hertfordshire, Oxfordshire and Buckinghamshire before heading to West London for a crucial auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin is playing catch up as she and fellow auctioneer Philip Serrell take a trip around Sussex and Kent before heading to their penulitimate auction in Rayleigh, Essex.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last day for Natasha Raskin and Philip Serrell, and they cover Berkshire and Hampshire. But who will win at the final auction in Salisbury?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Mark Stacey begin their adventure in Kent. Along the way, Thomas visits the life-saving underground world of Ramsgate, and Mark finds out about the science behind a lighthouse in Dover.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit King's College, Cambridge. The intriguing finds are a letter from Florence Nightingale, the racing silk of a famous jockey, a collection of old wedding photographs, and an Art Deco diamond brooch found in wartime London.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: A return visit to Kings College, Cambridge is where the team finds a machine gun from World War One, a papal portrait rescued from the bottom of a river, and a set of rare maps recording America's early settlement valued at £10,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: The Roadshow team set up camp at Tyntesfield House near Bristol. Amongst the treasures brought for valuation are an elegant grape holder made from silver, a cabinet of rare microscope slides, and a ruby and diamond brooch valued at £30,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: The Roadshow visits the Outer Hebrides as Michael and the team head for Stornoway on the island of Lewis. They assess some gruesome medical instruments, a table made from shipwreck salvage, and a painting bought for a song is valued at £20,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit the winner of the first BBC series of Restoration, the Victoria Baths in Manchester. They are presented with an Art Deco cigarette case, a 'shock therapy machine,' and an ornate pedestal that had been abandoned in a garage.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: The special Michael marks the 200th anniversary of the Battle of Trafalgar. Assessed items are ornately decorated ostrich eggs carved by a member of the ship's crew and a box made out of debris taken from the vessel in the battle's aftermath.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team head to Abergavenny in Wales, where a strange coincidence unites two Beatles collectors. Other items brought to light are carved whalebone and a macabre pottery model of a famous Victorian murder scene.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit Ipswich. Amongst the items viewed are a collection of pre-historic spearheads, an early American flag, a highly valuable silver tankard, and a pair of spectacles worn by Napoleon, as well as a collection of 5,000 Dinky toys.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit Dartington Hall near Totnes in Devon, where they examine a set of royal cuff links, a letter from Admiral Nelson, and a valuable collection of silver that surprised parishioners when found in the back of the village church.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Returning to Dartington in Devon finds Michael and the team with another busy day of finds, including a French cabinet with royal connections, a collection of personal letters and artwork produced by Quentin Crisp, and a toy rabbit valued at £10,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: In this special edition, Michael Aspel traces what has happened to some of the show's star items. Have owners grown to love items normally banished to the attic after hearing the Roadshow experts' excitement?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Diamond Jubilee
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the Antiques Roadshow team are in a celebratory mood with this special edition marking the Queen's diamond jubilee. Guests arrive at Kensington Palace to record their stories of royal encounters with the Queen in a moving tribute.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Special
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a special edition of Antiques Roadshow, as the team heads to Stratford-upon-Avon in search of treasures at Charlecote Park. With Shakespeare's home close by, they search for objects from the days of Elizabethan England.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The nave of Lincoln Cathedral is the setting for the first of the new series when the familiar team of experts uncover rare silver, furniture and ceramics, leavened with a rich variety of toys, dolls and objets d'art brought by local people.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Examining how swallows appear each spring; Insects, such as butterflies, suddenly arrive in the summer.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines how fleas jump; he tracks the true speed of a cheetah.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines orangutans and crows, two unusual animals that use tools.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have fascinated people for centuries; he looks at the expandable bodies of anacondas and camels.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A look at some species with unusual styles of consuming food, including the gigantic blue whales and the flamboyant flamingos.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines some species with remarkable healing properties.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A look at the incredible animals who can regenerate entire parts of their bodies, like salamanders and deer.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines bizarre and deadly hybrid animals.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines animals with the ability to find their way.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines the sizes of animals' young.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough discovers if animals and plants can count.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough investigates two shells that win at evolution.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough explores animals with fighting behavior.

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: Something strange in the water in the Caribbean; a four-foot worm in a fish tank; a tick turns America vegetarian.

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: A crab is milked for its blue blood; stones move by themselves; thousands of rabbits chase down tourists.

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: A virgin snake gives birth in the U.K.; a sea serpent washes up in the U.S.; goats stand still in a tree in Morocco.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Animals appear to have stretched their natural gifts to the limits, including giraffes and chameleons.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Curiosities lead to accusations of forgery.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough looks at some amazing quirks of evolution; he encounters two examples where nature has tinkered with the aging process.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the tusk of the narwhal and the spiral shells found on snails and ammonites.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Beautifully patterned or brightly colored animals attract the attention of collectors.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Female Komodo dragons can reproduce without contact with a male; female aphids can clone themselves to produce copies.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Rhinos and hedgehogs protect themselves with body armor in the form of thick skin.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Animals adapt to life in the dark; owl eyes are too large to move within their sockets; the giant squid has the largest eyes in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on amazing animals; he looks at cuckoos and the way the death's-head hawkmoth steals honey.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on nature's most amazing animals; he takes a closer look at the vampire bat.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein arrives in the region of Perigord, famous for decadent dishes; he discovers his favorite market in the city of Perigueux and learns about the region's historical relationship with England as the former kingdom of Aquitaine.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein's journey of discovery brings him to the sunnier climes of the Mediterranean, where he explores the French-Catalan legacy of Roussilon on the foothills of the Pyrenees next to the Spanish border.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein approaches the end of his meander through France with a final glance at the culinary delights of the Languedoc before crossing over to Provence and the Mediterranean coastline that reveals new insights into southern French cuisine.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: Rick Stein discovers sausages and sheep's cheese and explores the locals' passion for chestnuts in Corsica.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: On a misty lagoon in Sardinia Rick watches the fishermen catch mullet using the same methods as the Romans did centuries before. He boards a ferry for Sicily to find, in the heart of Palermo, one of the best pasta dishes he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: Rick travels from Sicily to Puglia.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: Departing from Italy and on to Corfu.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: In Mallorca, Rick finds wonderful seafood dishes and the most succulent roast lamb he's ever tasted, while in Barcelona he samples Catalonian food at the famous Boqueria market.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: Rick samples the delights of couscous, tagines and mint tea in Moroccan bazaars, before heading along the old silk route to south-eastern Turkey, where he tastes the finest kebabs.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein embarks on a new journey through the byways of France, from the Channel to the Mediterranean, always on the look out for things where the British could learn from the French to enhance lives.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein's goes through France's eastern border regions of Alsace and Jura home to his favourite French dish, choucroute garni and favorite French cheese, comté.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein continues exploring Burgundy and practices a little entente cordiale with a chateau owner who cooks him sorrel soup straight out of the garden.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein arrives in the region of Perigord, famous for decadent dishes; he discovers his favorite market in the city of Perigueux and learns about the region's historical relationship with England as the former kingdom of Aquitaine.

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious
programme.desc: Luxury travel blogger Em Sheldon catches a flight on one of the most extravagant private jets in the world, which cost more than £80m to build and kit out.

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon does reconnaissance at Kalaveraz Cocina-Cantina in Escondido, California, and finds an owner so in over his head that he's resorted to not paying his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A son takes over the failing family bar, and the biggest obstacle to getting out of the red is his abusive father, who spends all night sitting at the bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon visits a Las Vegas dive to teach the owner of Jack's Place how to act less like a mother and more like a boss.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Dunwoody, Georgia, Jon Taffer tries to help a former hospitality professional regain his passion for the industry and save his flailing bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer must save an ambitious but rookie family-run brewery that was forced to open during the pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Vegas bar Kerry's was meant as a gift from a grandpa to his family, but the grandkids' mismanagement threatens to squander everything.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: For his 200th rescue, Jon rescues a family who bought a Mexican restaurant at the height of the pandemic and put their daughter's future on the line to chase the bright lights of Vegas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is tasked with rescuing a Chicago sports bar that's heavy on managers and light on respect for the owner.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A family-owned bar is put at risk when a son's excessive drinking and poor management choices begin to attract an X-rated clientele.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A roach infestation is just one of many problems Jon must face in order to save Headhunters, a fetish-themed tiki bar and music venue in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A successful St. Louis, MO, restaurateur risks everything when she decides to add a downtown sports bar to her portfolio and put her out-of-control nephew in charge.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon steps in to save J.A. Murphy's, a dive bar in Fell's Point, MD, on the brink of financial and physical collapse.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to save The Sandbar in Albuquerque, New Mexico, but before he can save the failing beach-themed bar, he has to figure out who the actual owner is first.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Brother and sister owners develop a bitter sibling rivalry when they take over the historic Sam Jordan's bar in San Francisco.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean is faced with a life-or-death decision during a daring cave rescue in which Kekoa faces her greatest fear. Hobie plans to get married, but Mitch is at odds with his fiancée’s obnoxious parents.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: The Team hunts men mutilating sharks for their fins. Jason, who's always feared sharks, learns to accept the local tradition that sharks are sacred protectors of the Hawaiian Islands.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Allie discovers a rare Hawaiian coin from a ship that sank after the Pearl Harbor attack. Sean lets the team dive for sunken treasure provided it doubles as a training exercise. The deep-sea dive leads to discord, dissent, and explosive danger.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Allie is terrified she may lose the love of her life when Nick gets the bends in a daring attempt to rescue a mini-sub on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: A dark secret from Dawn's past could jeopardize her career as a Baywatch Hawaii Lifeguard. JD puts his new invention, a double scuba fin, to the test trying to rescue a young boy being sucked into whirring propeller blades in a storm vent.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Dawn and Sean are drawn to the strange and spiritual powers of the mind. Kekoa, Allie and Jessie try to save lives after disaster strikes at a party.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean has mixed feelings about Jenna, the beautiful but smug new head of North Shore Lifeguards. When nudists protest on the beach, Sean and Jenna have to work intimately together to save the day, if they don't kill each other first!

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Kekoa, Dawn and Allie reexamine their femininity. Jason rehearses a love scene with a sexy actress. JD tries to rebound from his breakup with Jessie.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Dawn saves a skydiver who could be her ex-boyfriend in disguise. Jason is assigned to a Beach where he has to confront a terrible incident from his past.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jason falls for a Kahuna's beautiful granddaughter. Jenna wants to take over the team and shut down the training center she thinks is a waste of money. Sean vows to fight her.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean reveals a secret to Jenna that could threaten his job. Allie and Jason fly her helicopter to the big island where they have to rescue four people trapped on a volcanic lava reef.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jessie tries to overcome her condition to compete in the Maui triathlon with Dawn as her coach. Allie suspects an agenda behind Dawn's motives. Jason and Kekoa seek a mysterious underwater Hawaiian spirit that lures people to their deaths.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean tries to keep his relationship with Jenna a secret. When the team has to rescue swimmers trapped in a filtration tube, Jenna is sucked down a shaft and Sean risks everything to save her, revealing his darkest secret.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: No longer able to cope with his guilt of surviving the attack on Pearl Harbor, Jessie's grandfather comes to Hawaii to end his life. Can Mitch intervene in time? Kekoa and Sean help a college basketball player learn to swim.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Hungary with a bantamweight world title fight pitting Eduardo 'Dudu' Dantas against Leandro Higo. Also an explosive featherweight bout between Hungarian-born Adam 'The Kid' Borics (5-0) and Anthony 'Pretty Boy' Taylor.

programme.title: Bellator 178: Straus vs Pitbull 4
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place from Mohegan Sun in Connecticut featuring a featherweight world title fight between Patricio Pitbull and Daniel Straus in the fourth chapter of their storied rivalry. Also, AJ McKee and Ilima-Lei Macfarlane return to action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to London with a stacked card featuring a showdown between top welterweights Paul “Semtex” Daley and Rory MacDonald, along with appearanc-es from Michael “MVP” Page, Cheick Kongo, Baby Slice and Liam McGeary.

programme.title: Bellator NYC: Sonnen vs Silva
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Madison Square Garden in NY with a blockbuster card. Chael Sonnen and Wanderlei Silva in a long-awaited grudge match. The double main event also sees Fedor Emelianenko taking on Matt Mitrione. Also, Douglas Lima and Michael Chandler!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is live with its biggest show ever from Madison Square Garden featuring new signee Ryan Bader taking on Champ Phil Davis for the Light Heavyweight belt. Irish phenom James Gallagher taking on KO artist Chinzo Machida.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place in Thackerville, Oklahoma with a rubber match between two veteran standouts as Brandon Girtz meets Derek Campos in a main event sure to produce fireworks! The stacked card also features fights with Joe Warren and Kendall Grove.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is from Verona, New York with a Middleweight showdown as Chidi Njokuani takes on former champ Andrey Koreshkov. Heavy-handed Brennan Ward will face off against Fernando Gonzalez in the co-main slot.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes home to San Jose, California with a collision between top lightweights as Patricky Pitbull meets Benson Henderson. Plus the Bellator debut of Roy “Big Country” Nelson when he faces hard-hitting Javy Ayala in a heavyweight battle.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville as Eduardo Dantas puts his Bantamweight world title on the line against Darrion Caldwell. This stacked fight card also features Daniel Straus taking on Emmanuel Sanchez and Pat Curran facing off against John Macapa.

programme.title: Bellator 185: Mousasi vs. Shlemenko
programme.desc: The elite two-division threat, Gegard Mousasi makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight Champion Alexander Shlemenko who is on a five-fight win streak.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susan emailed Dr. Phil claiming she's at war with her son-in-law, David & daughter, Bekah. Susan is not sure why she's not allowed to see her grandchildren, but claims Bekah blames her "sinful behavior." Can Susan mend things to see her grandkids again?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents are bombarded with the dangers kids can fall prey: molesters, cyber-stalkers, drugs & bullies. But how far to go to ensure your child's safety? Where do you draw the line between hovering over your children & giving them enough freedom?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's a parent's worst nightmare to learn their child was sexually abused, especially in their own home. Patty says her world ended the day she learned her husband was sexually abusing her 3 daughters. What warning signs did she miss?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Anita says her son Orrin, 24, after graduating from NYU, announced he is a mechanized cyborg from the year 2050! Orrin says he's part of a "collective intelligence" sent back in time by "higher beings" to warn humanity of the upcoming apocalypse.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom Kelly says Ellie, 16, is on a path of self-destruction, & she fears for her daughter's life. Ellie has an eating disorder, is suicidal, cuts herself & has overdosed on drugs while lashing out in anger on a daily basis. Dr. Phil helps set a new path.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she's not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace. Dr. Phil sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melisa says her estranged husband, Chris, is a pathological liar. Chris admits he has a problem with telling the truth and insists he wants to change -- but does he really? What's at the root of Chris' behavior? Should Melisa stay or call it quits?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tensions run high in this father/daughter battle conclusion. McKinley, 18, confronts her dad for allegedly being "abusive" in her childhood & a "pedophile," claims he denies. Dr. Phil questions Cory on an incident leading to Cory's sexual battery arrest.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Inside the “California House of Horrors” where 13 children were starved, chained and abused by their own parents. Family, neighbors and childhood friends speak about the tragedy. Cleveland kidnap survivor Michelle Knight sends a message to the children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Karla claims that she is in contact via online chats and texting with film industry legend Tyler Perry--and they are married. There’s one hitch to this fairytale romance; she’s never even met the man she calls her new husband! Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do "van life" blogger Gabby Petito's videos reveal what might have happened? TV host Nancy Grace, a former law enforcement officer & FBI defense tactics instructor, a criminal defense attorney & a body language expert all weigh in on the unusual details.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shemida says she has been diagnosed with more than 70 medical and mental health conditions and prescribed more than 80 medications over a 10-year span. Her sister, Dana, believes Shemida fabricates her issues for attention. Is Shemida really sick? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pam says her ex-husband, Ed, is enabling, Andee's, 24, addiction by giving her money, which she uses for drugs. Ed admits he allows Andee to manipulate him but says he's afraid she'll resort to prostitution or worse. Can Ed learn to change his approach?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Paula says her 19-year-old daughter, Kylie is on a path of self-destruction, but Kylie says Paula is at fault for being a bad role model. Who is telling the truth?

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: Morning Buzz
programme.desc: Start your day with the latest top sports headlines and highlights.

programme.title: Midday Rundown
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ keeps you completely up to speed on all the top trending stories dominating the sports world.

programme.title: Trending Now
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ analysts break down the day's top stories and highlights.

programme.title: Primetime Pregame LIVE
programme.desc: HQ's experts dissect upcoming games and dish out top bets.

programme.title: Gameday Scoreboard & Highlights
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ keeps you completely up to speed with highlights, top stories and in-game updates.

programme.title: Scoreboard Final
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ analysts break down the day's top stories and highlights.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Negocios personales
programme.desc: Después de que Emily Harrison (Danielle Savre) le dice a Danny y Baez que teme que su ex novio abusivo vuelva a comportarse de la misma manera con su nueva novia, Emily se convierte en la principal sospechosa cuando él es asesinado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Las yemas de los dedos y los dientes desmembrados de un marine asesinado se descubren en el bolso robado a un carterista, lo que lanza al NCIS a la misión de encontrar a un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo del NCIS se entera del espeluznante asesinato de uno de sus antiguos ayudantes de investigación, pronto descubren que la víctima ha estado vendiendo información sobre cómo robar un almacén lleno de posesiones caras.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs cuestiona los motivos de Vance cuando le piden que interrogue a un adolescente acusado de matar a su padre, un marine retirado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Negocios personales
programme.desc: Después de que Emily Harrison (Danielle Savre) le dice a Danny y Baez que teme que su ex novio abusivo vuelva a comportarse de la misma manera con su nueva novia, Emily se convierte en la principal sospechosa cuando él es asesinado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the first football game approaches, Kelli and Judy watch tape on AT&T Stadium's famously large HD screens to see who is game day-ready -- and figure out the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make the emotional final cuts, dreams come true when the 2018 DCC squad is announced, and the women hit the field for their first game.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: As the roommates arrive in Biloxi, Mississippi for another wild vacation, they quickly realize they're a Lil' Bit short of eight people. But the party must go on, especially for Daddy, who pursues not one, but two of his roommates.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Hott Dogg is getting all the attention (and the other girls are jealous), and Daddy tries asking out every girl in the house.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The gang gets drunk and trashes a restaurant to celebrate Lyle's birthday, the Louisianimals start their new jobs, and Hott Dogg proves that she can party.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Hott Dogg tries to fix her problems with the girls by making dinner, and Daddy can't hear Lil Bit's name without getting emotional, which sets Tiffany off.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Daddy has many apologies to make after a drunken outburst, Hott Dogg joins Tiffany and Lauren for a girls' day, and Murray pulls a prank while everyone is out of the house.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Walt hopes to get lucky with one of Lauren's friends, Hott Dogg worries that Daddy will never get over Lil Bit, and Mattie is insulted after Murray pays her bar tab.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Everyone meets Mattie's angry alter ego Martha, and the boys try to take Daddy out for a guys' night to get his mind off Hott Dogg, which completely backfires.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Daddy and Hott Dogg can't seem to get back to normal after she sees that he's not ready for anything serious, and the gang heads down to Louisiana to see their parents.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The Louisianimals travel to New Orleans where Mattie ends her dry spell, but the same can't be said for Daddy and Hott Dogg.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Daddy and Hott Dogg try to sort out their relationship on their own, but Tiffany keeps butting in because she's worried that it's just another Lil Bit situation.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Mattie competes in a bikini contest at Mudfest, Hott Dogg has an encounter with Martha, and everyone tries to tie up loose ends on the last day of vacation.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Christine Lakin sits down with Daddy, Tiffany, and Walt to talk about reuniting for season three, view never-before-seen clips and chat with a special guest.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: This season the cast packs their bags for the Sunshine State, only to encounter some major shade. Hannah's new love interest divides the house, and with tensions high, Tiffany and Hannah funnel their way into an explosive smackdown.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: After a chaotic first night in the house, Tiffany must deal with the fallout from her fight with Hannah. Meanwhile, a backflip gone-wrong lands Murray in the hospital. And an emotional Lyle is haunted by his past relationship.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The gang barely survives a wild taxi ride with an angry Mattie, Lauren gets fed up with her shady boyfriend, and Walt & Murray's prank gets hairy.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man who claims he’s merely returning a bicycle to its owner is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to escape on foot after driving without a license, two friends hide meth in plain sight, and an intoxicated man is caught peering into a restaurant after hours.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic accident where a man ran his truck through a wall. An undercover officer poses as a “john” hoping to attract unsuspecting prostitutes. A vehicle is stopped due to a missing license plate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with multiple felony warrants gets one last taste of freedom before heading to prison. A speeding driver is arrested for the same thing he was arrested for the day before. A runaway suspect leaves a trail behind him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter a restless passenger during a routine traffic stop, deputies track down a shoplifter with a particular taste, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Cops pursue a man skipping bail, an impaired driver is surprisingly cooperative, and officers struggle to remove a violent offender from a crime scene.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tackles a masked man with an outstanding warrant, an erratic driver is stopped driving to a nail salon, and police respond to a domestic assault involving hot wax.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disturbed naked man is spotted in a park covered in blood. Officers find a nude couple in a U-Haul truck. A traffic stop over a minor violation turns into a dangerous pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers in both Wichita, KS and Palm Beach, FL. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering up services is likely not who he thinks they are.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver leaves her car during a routine traffic stop, officers stop a car that appears to have fake tags, and police respond to an altercation between a father and son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies find a child in the backseat of a hit-and-run suspect's car, officers respond to a shoplifting call, and a man calls the cops over his stepson's erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers split up to interrogate two men suspected of stealing a pick-up truck, a motorist tries to ditch a bag of meth, and police discover a bunch of syringes in a vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop takes a surprising turn when a suspect creates a spur-of-the-moment diversion, and a soft-spoken driver has difficulty being upfront with the officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate first-hand the behind-the-scenes action of Cirque du Soleil in order to determine what may have contributed to a young dancer's untimely death.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: A magazine rejects Diane's poem and accepts Sam's writing instead.

programme.desc: Woody lies to his hometown girlfriend when she shows up with another guy.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane tricks Sam into proposing to her again and she accepts.

programme.desc: A misunderstanding leads the town to believe that Frasier is gay.

programme.desc: Frasier competes with Martin over the affections of his childhood babysitter.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's romantic dry spell has everyone trying to set him up.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier inadvertently eavesdrops on Ronee making a date with another man. Martin takes the news badly, accusing him of spying.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Maris seeks protection from Niles for her violent new boyfriend. Because of Daphne's mood swings, Niles tries to keep his meeting secret, which fails when the boyfriend shows up at a fake baby shower and punches Frasier.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Maris is arrested for the murder of her boyfriend. The press goes wild when they find out that Niles inadvertently loaned her the crossbow that was used as the murder weapon.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: Corona de Lagrimas
programme.desc: Refugio trabaja como contadora para poder mantener a sus tres hijos. Sin embargo, la vida de todos da un giro cuando uno de ellos es llevado a la cárcel y tienen que resolver sus propios problemas.

programme.title: Cuidado con el amor
programme.desc: Pedro, con la ayuda de dos mejores amigos de su padre busca un tesoro enterrado en una hacienda colonial. Elsa y su madre quieren impedirlo. Al fin el amor interviene y Pedro y Elsa comparten la fortuna y su felicidad.

programme.title: Los Alegres Aguilares
programme.desc: El aventurero Manuel se encuentra con Carlos, quien es casi idéntico a él. Uno es de familia rica y el otro no. Entonces Manuel le ofrece dinero a Carlos para que se haga pasar por él con una señorita con la cual no se quiere casar.

programme.title: Cuando los hermanos se encuentran
programme.desc: Tom Cruise interpreta a un comerciante de ruedas egocéntrico que descubre que tiene un hermano autista (Dustin Hoffman) y lo lleva a un viaje inolvidable por todo el país en esta histérica, profunda y conmovedora ganadora del Oscar® a la Mejor Película.

programme.title: A.I. Inteligencia artificial
programme.desc: En un mundo futuro, los humanos comparten aspectos de su vida con robots de compañía llamados "Mechas". Pero cuando un prototipo de niño-robot llamado David es programado para demostrar amor incondicional..

programme.title: La fuerza de la verdad
programme.desc: Henry es un abogado exitoso que necesita ganar a toda costa, incluso si debe sacrificar a su familia. Pero un disparo detiene el veloz ascenso de Henry, dejándolo incapacitado y sin recuerdos de su vida anterior.

programme.title: Desde mi cielo
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a la adolescente de 14 años Susie Salmon, ella deja atrás una vida inconclusa. Ahora, desde su lugar en un extraño pero hermoso mundo intermedio, ella debe ayudar a su padre a atrapar a su asesino.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: Telaraña
programme.desc: Después de la horrible muerte de su compañero, el detective y escritor Alex Cross se ha refugiado en la paz de su retiro. Pero cuando un criminal brillante (Michael Wincott) secuestra a la hija de un senador, Alex debe volver a la acción.

programme.title: Garras
programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.title: A Walk On The Moon
programme.desc: En el verano de 1969, Pearl (Diane Lane) conoce a un extraño sensual y de espíritu libre (Viggo Mortensen), durante unas tediosas vacaciones familiares más con su esposo. Así que hará lo impensable: tener un intrépido y apasionado amorío.

programme.title: ¿Bailamos?
programme.desc: John Clark es un adicto al trabajo dócil que se siente atrapado en una existencia aburrida y soporífera. Una noche, su vida cambia tras ver a una hermosa instructora de danza que lo inspira a salirse de sus esquemas y aprender pasos elaborados.

programme.title: I.Q: fórmula para amar
programme.desc: Todo el mundo sabe que Einstein es un genio científico. Pero ¿qué hay de Einstein el casamentero? I.Q. pone esta noción a prueba y logra resultados ganadores en esta "divertida y cálida comedia romántica" que aplauden críticos y público.

programme.title: Jane
programme.desc: Anne Hathaway ofrece una brillante interpretación como una joven y amorosa Jane Austen en esta divertida e interesante comedia, explorando un romance indescriptible que inspiró las novelas de uno de los autores más célebres del mundo.

programme.title: El Pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: El vengador del futuro
programme.desc: Es el año 2084 D.C.y a Doug Quaid lo persiguen sueños recurrentes de un viaje a Marte, el planeta vecino más cercano a la Tierra. Vive en una época que ha sobrevivido otra guerra mundial y donde las elecciones para el gobierno ya no existen.

programme.title: La ciudad del pecado (Sin City)
programme.desc: En estas historias entrecruzadas, un universo de héroes improbables y reacios, intentan hacer lo correcto en una ciudad a la que ya no le importa nada.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: The Legend Of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The sole surviving Texas Ranger of an ambush arranged by the outlaw leader Butch Cavandish returns to fight back as a great masked western hero - The Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: King Creole
programme.desc: Elvis Presley gives Bourbon Street a new beat in King Creole. He plays a troubled youth whose singing sets the French Quarter rockin’.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: His mother (Angela Lansbury) expects him to climb the corporate ladder. But Elvis would rather wear an aloha shirt than a white collar, so he goes to work as a tour guide. Lucky Elvis: his first customers are a car full of cuties.

programme.title: Easy Come, Easy Go
programme.desc: On his last day in the Navy, frogman Elvis discovers a sunken treasure ship. On his first day as a civilian, Elvis starts his new job—self-employed treasure hunter!

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He’s a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King…but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: The Misfits
programme.desc: In their final screen performances, Clark Gable and Marilyn Monroe are at their luminous best as an aging cowboy and a disillusioned divorcee, each trying to adapt to new ways of life in John Huston's piercing classic. Montgomery Clift also stars.

programme.title: Little Big Man
programme.desc: From director Arthur Penn (BONNIE AND CLYDE), Dustin Hoffman, Chief Dan George, Faye Dunaway, Martin Balsam, Jeff Corey and Richard Mulligan star in a genre-defying tale of an alleged 121-year-old white survivor of Custer's Last Stand.

programme.title: Doc

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix reveals how he destroyed his own marriage by trying to save Oscar's.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar share ownership of a new car, multiplying their differences.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix reveals, in a flashback, the hectic events leading up to Oscar's marriage when both were in the Army Reserve.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Billie Jo has landed her first job, but Kate's not so sure she approves: Billie's going to be private secretary to novelist Oliver Fenton, whose books have been banned in Hooterville.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: It's some miles to the nearest telephone and the girls are beginning to feel like social outcasts, but Kate can't afford to have a special line run to Shady Rest.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Hooterville's embarrassed volunteer firemen, unable to put out a blaze on the Cannonball, have to call for outside help.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: As Hooterville's bounty hunter, Uncle Joe may finally get the chance to capture someone: Two escaped convicts are in the area.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Cannonball must temporarily cease operations: A bird has established a nest in the train's smokestack. Needless to say, Homer Bedloe tries to turn the situation to his advantage.

programme.desc: Sally gets a marriage proposal from an opportunistic comedian who wants her to write his material.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob finds himself in hot water after inadvertently lifting a comedy idea from another show.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recalls the hectic days after Ritchie was born when he was sure the hospital had given him and Laura the wrong baby.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob unwittingly bids on and wins an ugly clown painting that covers another work beneath, perhaps a masterpiece.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob would like to know why Laura disappears every time his insurance agent comes over or calls.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter volunteers Gomer for a parachute jump.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer loses the colonel's daughter at a go-go club, then tracks her to a beatnik den.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's new friend, a crow, turns out to be a thief, plundering everyone -- and stashing the loot in Gomer's locker.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter and Gomer hunt for a live mortar shell which the private lost during practice.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: When Lou-Ann is about to be fired from her job as a nightclub singer, Gomer finds her a job as a salesgirl.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study, but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogan's style.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter. Burkhalter finds out. Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for $1,000,000 in diamonds, but can he be trusted?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi general's assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogan's success, Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht, each trying to take over Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is stymied over how to rescue a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt. Schultz.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany, so he creates a health spa.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Lieutenant Lonnie Jamison’s wealthy aunt, Cordelia Woodlin, is back in Sparta and spending time with her very old and dear friend, blues singer Ches Collins; that is until Ches starts receiving racist death threats warning him to stay away from her.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Soon after Virgil Tibbs is hired by a local law firm, a pair of wealthy clients, the Bookers, are in a car accident; Chuck Booker survives, but Abby is killed. Chuck claims he was dodging a deer, but Tibbs suspects that Abby’s death was no accident.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A new synagogue in Sparta is plagued by vandalism, but when the temple is destroyed and the sacred Torah is stolen, Rabbi Feldman refuses Sheriff Gillespie’s help based on a decades-old anti-Semitic crime that Gillespie apparently helped cover up.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While trying to keep his buddy Justin out of trouble, Eugene Glendon jeopardizes his probation when he is seen leaving the scene of a robbery at a local gas station. Meanwhile, Eugene insists his mother Harriet choose between him and Bill Gillespie.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Wealthy landowner Frank Davenport is developing a large tract of his property into an expensive residential community. When a number of old slave artifacts are discovered at his construction site, it triggers a chain of events that ends in murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Much to the dismay of Parker Williams, his wayward stepfather, Daddy Roy Eversole, returns to Sparta with his current girlfriend, Roda, and moves into Parker’s home. Even worse, they’re being pursued by a pair of desperate art thieves from Florida.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: On the eve of his wedding to Harriet De Long, Sheriff Bill Gillespie is stalked by a vengeance-seeking killer in a case of mistaken identity when a newspaper accidentally uses a photo of Gillespie in a story about the previous sheriff, Will McComb.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: The town council decides not to renew Bill Gillespie’s contract, pushing him into a sudden retirement. As the new Sparta police chief, Hampton Forbes, arrives from Memphis, a young boy emulates the violence he sees on television and shoots a man.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Bill Gillespie and Hampton Forbes begin their new roles as Sheriff of Newman County and Sparta Chief of Police and must immediately team up to solve a triple murder involving a young man with an intellectual disability. Wayne Brady guest stars.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: After a robbery and tragic triple murder, one thief is missing, one is dead and a terrified young man with an intellectual disability, Henry Ulmer, is on the run. As the police search for Henry, Gillespie and Forbes work together to solve the case.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When Bubba’s friend Lori admits to him that she has contracted HIV from a shady real estate agent, Bubba is set on having the man indicted for knowingly transmitting the virus. Then, suddenly, the man is found murdered and Lori is the prime suspect.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When mischievous Cowboy Habersham leads his buddies to a field to steal watermelons for a raucous party at a local lake, no one could predict that the night would end in the murder of Donnie Cole; a murder tangled in a web of infidelity and deceit.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sheriff Bill Gillespie's daughter Lana learns that her old flame, Lee Thompson, has arrived in Sparta and may be illegally running guns to a local hunting store owner, Raymond Mercer. He’s caught the attention of Lonnie Jamison, who fears the worst.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While singing at her boyfriend Troy’s nightclub, LuAnn Corbin discovers that he is being forced by a shady drug dealer from his past, Brent Shaw, to use the club as a cover to sell Ecstasy. LuAnn is torn between love and her duty as an officer.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Heroism on the part of Richard Kimble all but lead to his capture by Lt. Gerard.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver flees from the Budapest police and the KGB while attempting to free a band of gypsy pickpockets imprisoned for stealing a watch containing top-secret information.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights for his life in one of his most awesome adventures as he travels to the sweltering jungles of South America

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido agredida sexualmente y apuñalada hasta la muerte en la playa. Se descubrió un par de zapatos de tenis de hombre cerca de su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ahogamiento seco
programme.desc: Cuando Genell Plude es encontrada muerta en su baño, la escena apunta a un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen era especialmente violenta: un esposo y una esposa fueron asesinados a tiros en su habitación. ¿Fue cómplice su hija de 16 años?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mañana, en una zona desértica en las afueras de Phoenix, un motociclista descubre el cuerpo de una joven mujer. Había sido golpeada, amarrada, estrangulada y posiblemente violada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, Julie Estes fue secuestrada de una tienda de conveniencia en Southside donde trabajaba. Su cuerpo fue encontrado al día siguiente, pero el asesinato quedó sin resolver hasta el 2003.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era un hombre que se forjó a sí mismo que nunca medía sus palabras. Quizás fue asesinado por un cliente o empleado descontento. Tal vez las fotos picantes en su caja fuerte tenían la pista para resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se descubrió un esqueleto humano en las marismas de Carolina del Norte y, cuando los investigadores descubrieron que había estado muerta durante 18 meses, sabían que sería difícil descubrir quién era, y mucho más quién la mató.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, el desarrollador inmobiliario de Colorado, Alan Helmick, fue encontrado muerto a tiros en su casa por su esposa Miriam, quien luego se convirtió en la principal sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la década de los 90, los medios llamaron a Richard Rogers el "asesino de la última llamada" porque atacaba a hombres en bares gay que obviamente estaban intoxicados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Camino fatal
programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Brian y Beverly Mauck fueron encontrados muertos en su casa en Graham Washington. Usando una huella de la palma de una mano y de un zapato en la escena del crimen, los investigadores enfocan su atención en Daniel Tavares, quien había tatuado la espalda de Brian.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
